title: 第1回耕作ステークス開催？

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Kyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hah! Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at Tracen Academy's carrot patch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki, Tamamo Cross, and Inari One are
all taking part in some voluntary farmwork.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Whew! Tending carrots is quite backbreaking.
choice_data_list: Great job with the volunteer work!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. It's so satisfying to help others. It
makes for good training too.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, I wonder how Tamamo and
Inari are doing. I'd be more than happy to lend
them some help...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: They should be tending that field over there...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whew! You gotta sweat in the fields to truly
'ppreciate how delicious your daily rice is! How ya
holdin' up, Tama?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm doin' real good! This is easy as turnin'
over takoyaki!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Look at you, actin' all tough! All right, how 'bout
we have a little competition?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a blast, count me in! Get in on this,
Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Da first-ever "Farmin' Stakes" are about to kick
off!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid I'll have to pass.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't be a party pooper. Havin' a lil' fun can
speed this stuff up, ya know.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This is all to help the academy. We mustn't lose
sight of that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Farming is similar to mental training.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: How so?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It may seem like rough work at first glance, but
farming actually involves delicate technique. At
times, you clash forcefully with nature, while at
others, you tend to the crops with care.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As you watch over the crops slowly growing
bigger and stronger, you grow as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You can't simply give in to your emotions and
throw yourself into things single-mindedly.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, now I get it! When ya put it that way, I feel
like maybe I could get behind that way of thinkin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, hearin' you say that all composed-like sure
is convincin'...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Inari! Let's take a page outta Yaeno's book
and work like we're trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I hear ya loud and clear! Farmin' is trainin'... Hehe,
ya got me there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whew! That's most the tillin' done, don'tcha
think?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, should be. Wanna take a li'l break? We
can't go gettin' tunnel vision, after all. Gotta
remember the basics of farmin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You might wanna take a break too, Yaeno—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Th-the heck wuzzat?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Mind focused, with full concentration! That is true
growth! Hi-yah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clink! Scrape! Clank! Scrape!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hold a sec! Aren't you da one that said not to
give into your emotions?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I-I guess this is a form of trainin' for her, but
maybe we should stop her, all the same?
choice_data_list: Keep going, Yaeno! Put your back into it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! I will do my best!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Haaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Y-ya sure she's okay goin' so hard?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I don't know... Though, the field is gettin' tilled real fast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki finishes tilling with astonishing
speed. The work does get done ahead of
schedule, but...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! Now that's real training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Actually, if she's pleased with the results, maybe
we ought to leave it at that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly right! Once you start training, you
can't abandon it partway through!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Focus! Push! Focus! Push!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
S-so precise! I thought she was relyin' on raw
strength, but now that I'm lookin' real close, I can
see how meticulous she is!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: C'mon, we can't let her outdo us! Let's go, Tama!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the three of them continue to till
the field diligently...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, they do so well that Director Akikawa,
who's in charge of the plot, praises their efforts!
